corners.name: Abbey
corners.notes: High-speed entry after main straight. Used to be flat; now requires slight lift.

corners.name: Village
corners.notes: End of the Wellington Straight. Heavy braking zone, overtaking.

corners.name: The Loop
corners.notes: Tight hairpin section; DRS zone follows.

corners.name: Brooklands
corners.notes: Named after the historic Brooklands circuit.

corners.name: Copse
corners.notes: High-speed right-hander. Was flat pre-2010. Scene of Hamilton-Verstappen 2021.

corners.name: Maggotts
corners.notes: High-speed complex. Drivers carry nearly full speed through here.

corners.name: Becketts
corners.notes: The Maggotts-Becketts-Chapel sequence is considered one of the best in F1.
